001.meta: You start the game...It's loading give it a minute.........Okayyyyyyy...... I'll have to say, inital impressions of this game are not positive........Why is it taking so long!?........Y'know what? Let's go do something else while we wait.

002.meta: You walk into your kitchen / lounge / dining room / living room thingy. Your cat Ruffles is sleeping on the long comfy padded chair thing that has multiple names for no good reason.

004.meta: Okay, okay... You ponder what kind of art you want to make.

005.cmd: > Find a piece of paper to scribble on
005.meta: You decide to look for some paper, and you find some.

006.meta: You decide to look for an instrument.
